title: ACTREC Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 02 Scientific Assistant B Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has announced the official notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for Scientific Assistant B Jobs, Candidates who have qualified in the B.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the ACTREC Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, and salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Govern...
